CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK( SiteDeRattachement__r.ComplementRue__c ), SiteDeRattachement__r.Rue__c & " - " & SiteDeRattachement__r.CodePostal__c & " - " & SiteDeRattachement__r.Ville__c, SiteDeRattachement__r.Rue__c & " - " & SiteDeRattachement__r.ComplementRue__c & " - " & SiteDeRattachement__r.CodePostal__c & " " & SiteDeRattachement__r.Ville__c)
CustomField.label: Adresse du site de rattachement
